case_title: BENCHARGE CREDIT SERVICE VS RADFORD, CAROLYN L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $937.59 FILED BY BENCHARGE CREDIT SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RADFORD, CAROLYN L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENCHARGE CREDIT SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RADFORD, CAROLYN L. $937.59 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $967.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RADFORD, CAROLYN L.
